intro.title: Hello and Welcome to My Website!
intro.description: This is my personal portfolio where I share programming projects, verified financial research, playable projects, and a pixel art studio. Scroll to explore — my resume is embedded below in a lazy-loading viewer and available to download. Pick a theme from the dock on the right; every one is a full personality, not a palette swap.

programming.title: 💻 Programming Works
programming.description: This site is the exhibit — these mini-terminals read the deployed source of the very page you're on. Click one to read it full-size.

posts.title: 📁 Articles & Posts
posts.description: Research papers, project reports, and professional updates — papers open in the on-site reader.

finance.title: 💸 The Financial Liberty Project
finance.description: Research deliverables with receipts. Every number is dated; every contested claim carries an honesty flag.

arcade.title: 🕹️ Games & Projects Arcade

projects.title: 🥩 NWA Meat & Plant Sourcing
projects.description: Where Northwest Arkansas food actually comes from: a research paper plus a working field guide to local meat and plant sourcing — farms, processors, seasons, and the honest economics of eating close to home.

projects.title: 📺 Official YouTube Channel
projects.description: Project walk-throughs, build logs, and demos — the channel is live, content is coming.

projects.title: 🎷 Jazz-Fusion / Progressive Rock Band
projects.description: Compositions and sessions in the works — recordings will land here and on the YouTube channel.

projects.title: 💼 Project Blogs & Professional Updates
projects.description: Long-form write-ups and career updates publish on LinkedIn first — follow along there.

projects.title: 🦞 The Clawmaxxing Project — Local-First AI Hub
projects.description: A multi-agent AI ecosystem that owns its intelligence instead of renting it: quantized open-weights LLMs on a dedicated Ubuntu mini-PC orchestrating specialist agents for content, security, dev, investing, and marketing — zero cloud dependency, everything under LUKS encryption on a Tailscale mesh. Full research paper (50+ pages, 100+ cited sources) in generation.

projects.title: 🐕 Clawmaxxing — Robot Dog
projects.description: A SunFounder PiDog V2 quadruped wired into the local LLM hub for first-person vision, navigation, and natural-language control — physical presence for the agent ecosystem. Research paper in generation.

projects.title: 🛡️ CybersecurityClaw
projects.description: A Kali Linux security laptop federated into the agent mesh — Bash Bunny, Flipper Zero, high-gain Wi-Fi audits, YubiKey hardware MFA — for AI-assisted security work on hardware I own and control. Research paper in generation.

projects.title: 🕶️ Clawmaxxing — Smart Glasses
projects.description: Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses relaying a live first-person feed to local vision models — ambient AI presence without a cloud call. Research paper in generation.

projects.title: ♻️ RetroClawing
projects.description: Reviving dead phones and forgotten laptops into working AI terminals — the most honest proof that local-first beats rent-from-the-cloud is when e-waste becomes useful again. Research paper in generation.

projects.title: 🔮 Clawmaxxing — Hologram
projects.description: A Looking Glass light-field display driving a lip-synced embodied avatar for the hub — studying how embodiment changes human-machine communication. Research paper in generation.

projects.title: 🚁 Clawmaxxing — Drone
projects.description: A Holybro X650 build (Pixhawk 6X, Jetson Orin NX running a fully onboard quantized LLM, OAK-D depth camera) for autonomous flight with zero cloud dependency. Research paper in generation.

arcade.title: 🎨 Pixel Art Studio Max
arcade.description: 16×16 studio — pick a color, paint, undo, save as PNG. Playable right here, no loading.

arcade.title: Shuffle Rush
arcade.description: Frutiger Metro rhythm action, live on itch.io. Built with Rosebud.ai + Phaser 3.

arcade.title: NWAero Grid Dashboard
arcade.description: Regional weather + traffic dashboard with real-time API aggregation. Collab build.

arcade.title: Coding Terminal Collective
arcade.description: Terminal coding collective with DevOps tooling, refactored from the academic repo.

arcade.title: Create Your Own Maxfolio
arcade.description: Full-stack networking parody site (Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase, Vercel).

arcade.title: Flock Finance
arcade.description: Blockchain-powered decentralized exchange concept for tokenized multi-investment vehicles — the home of the SaaS master portfolio. Feasibility research and project plan below.

arcade.title: Biotank
arcade.description: Closed-loop bio-digester tank system — feasibility study and project management plan drafted, prototyping next.

arcade.title: DiamondDrive
arcade.description: Gamified habit-and-goal drive system — research paper and project plan complete, prototype in the shop.

arcade.title: Winnow
arcade.description: Client-side, zero-dependency web app for swipe-based social network triage and ranking. v1.0.0-rc.1 — 'The Overgrown Feed' essay and project plan below.

arcade.title: SkyDisorder
arcade.description: Satirical single-file Canvas 2D arcade golf — 12K+ lines, census-verified, four phases complete.

arcade.title: Getting Through
arcade.description: 3D parody fighter in pre-production — Unity / Godot 4 stack, targeting itch.io + Roblox.

arcade.title: Keystone
arcade.description: 130K-line local-first AI agent platform (Rust, Tauri, React) — agents on your hardware, under your keys.
